name: pinmark
description: A minimal yet powerful bookmark manager for Chrome — organize, browse, search, and clean up your bookmarks with ease. Supports multiple languages.

scripts.build:website: npm run build && VERSION=$(node -p "require('./package.json').version") && rm -rf dist-website && mkdir -p dist-website && cp -R website/* dist-website/ && cp website/releases/*.zip dist-website/ && cd .output/chrome-mv3 && zip -r "../../dist-website/pinmark-chrome.zip" . -x '*.DS_Store' && cp "../../dist-website/pinmark-chrome.zip" "../../dist-website/pinmark-v${VERSION}.zip"
